question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention the main chapters or sections of the thesis. It focuses only on the problem statement and the justification of relevance, but fails to outline the roadmap of the work.

question: Description
feedback: Since the chapters are not listed, there is no description of the contents of each section. The text describes the problem and the necessity of the research, but not the structure of the thesis itself.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be understood from this text. While the logical flow of the research problem is clear, the reader does not know how the thesis is organized (e.g., theoretical part, methodology, experimental part, or comparison results).
